lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Replace the monolithic @Data annotation with explicit @Getter, @Setter, @NoArgsConstructor, and @AllArgsConstructor to gain finer control over generated code.
Simplify the student model by replacing separate name fields with a single 'name' field.
lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.human_impl: Replaced firstName, middleName, lastName with a single String name field.

lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Add a 'code' field to the Student class with explicit getter and setter annotations.
lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.human_impl: Added private String code with @Getter and @Setter annotations.

lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Add a 'dateOfBirth' field to the Student class.
Introduce a specific single-argument constructor for the Student class.
Remove the 'country' field from the Student class as it is no longer needed.

Adjust code indentation to use 2 spaces instead of 4 spaces.
